---
title: "D_integrativeanalysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#load packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
library(edgeR)
library(patchwork)
library(pheatmap)
```


```{r}
# Remove gene column and set rownames to gene names
load(here("data/GBM_data.RData"))
t_gbm_exp_clean <- gbm_exp_clean
t_gbm_exp_clean <- t_gbm_exp_clean[,-1]
t_gbm_exp_clean <- t(t_gbm_exp_clean)
colnames(t_gbm_exp_clean) <- gbm_exp_clean$gene
```

```{r}
t_gbm_exp_clean <- as.data.frame(t_gbm_exp_clean)
t_gbm_exp_clean$barcode <- rownames(t_gbm_exp_clean)

annot_t_gbm_exp_clean <- merge(t_gbm_exp_clean, gbm_anot_clean[, c("paper_Transcriptome.Subtype", "paper_IDH.status", "barcode","paper_Grade","paper_MGMT.promoter.status")], by = "barcode")
rownames(annot_t_gbm_exp_clean) <- annot_t_gbm_exp_clean$barcode
```
## Correlate top DEGs from Part I with continuous clinical variables (age, etc.) using Spearman's rho
```{r}
# define genes and variables
genes <- c("EGFR", "LTF", "RN7SL126P","GPR17")
variables <- c("paper_Age..years.at.diagnosis.", "paper_Survival..months.","paper_Mutation.Count","paper_ABSOLUTE.ploidy")

# prepare empty matrix
result_matrix <- matrix(NA, 
                        nrow = length(genes), 
                        ncol = length(variables),
                        dimnames = list(genes, variables))

# Loop
for (gene in genes) {
  for (variable in variables) {
    result_matrix[gene, variable] <- cor(gbm_anot_clean[[variable]],
                                         t_gbm_exp_clean[[gene]],
                                         method = "spearman",
                                         use = "complete.obs")
  }
}

result_matrix
```
##  Build a multimodal classifier: combine top expression features with key clinical features. Does adding clinical data improve predictive performance?

```{r}
# Top Expressionsfeatures (z.B. die Gene mit höchster Varianz)
gene_vars <- apply(t_gbm_exp_clean, 2, var)
top_genes <- names(sort(gene_vars, decreasing = TRUE)[1:50])

# Expressionsdaten der Top-Gene
expr_features <- t_gbm_exp_clean[, top_genes]

# Klinische Features
clinical_features <- gbm_anot_clean[, c("paper_Age..years.at.diagnosis.", 
                                         "paper_Survival..months.","paper_Mutation.Count",
                                        "paper_Percent.aneuploidy",
                                        "paper_TERT.expression..log2.",
                                        )]

# Zielvariable (z.B. Tumorsubtyp oder Überlebensstatus)
labels <- gbm_anot_clean$paper_IDH.status  # Beispiel
```


```{r}
library(randomForest)

# Fehlende Werte entfernen (randomForest verträgt keine NAs)
df_expr     <- na.omit(data.frame(expr_features, label = as.factor(labels)))
df_clinical <- na.omit(data.frame(clinical_features, label = as.factor(labels)))
df_combined <- na.omit(data.frame(expr_features, clinical_features, label = as.factor(labels)))

# Modelle trainieren
model_expr     <- randomForest(label ~ ., data = df_expr)
model_clinical <- randomForest(label ~ ., data = df_clinical)
model_combined <- randomForest(label ~ ., data = df_combined)

# OOB Accuracy (= 1 - OOB Error)
acc_expr     <- 1 - model_expr$err.rate[500, "OOB"]
acc_clinical <- 1 - model_clinical$err.rate[500, "OOB"]
acc_combined <- 1 - model_combined$err.rate[500, "OOB"]

# Übersichtstabelle
comparison <- data.frame(
  Modell    = c("Expression only", "Clinical only", "Combined"),
  OOB_Error = c(model_expr$err.rate[500, "OOB"],
                model_clinical$err.rate[500, "OOB"],
                model_combined$err.rate[500, "OOB"]),
  Accuracy  = c(acc_expr, acc_clinical, acc_combined)
)
print(comparison)
```
```{r}

# Verbesserung durch klinische Daten quantifizieren
improvement <- acc_combined - acc_expr
cat("Verbesserung durch klinische Daten:", round(improvement * 100, 2), "%\n")

# Confusion Matrix für jedes Modell
cat("\n--- Expression only ---\n")
print(model_expr$confusion)

cat("\n--- Clinical only ---\n")
print(model_clinical$confusion)

cat("\n--- Combined ---\n")
print(model_combined$confusion)

# Visualisierung
barplot(comparison$Accuracy,
        names.arg = comparison$Modell,
        ylim = c(0, 1),
        col = c("steelblue", "coral", "forestgreen"),
        ylab = "OOB Accuracy",
        main = "Does adding clinical data improve performance?")
abline(h = max(acc_expr, acc_clinical), lty = 2, col = "gray")
```

```{r}
library(glmnet)

# Nur vollständige Zeilen behalten
complete_idx <- complete.cases(clinical_features) & !is.na(labels)

clinical_matrix <- as.matrix(clinical_features[complete_idx, ])
label_factor    <- as.numeric(as.factor(labels[complete_idx])) - 1

lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(clinical_matrix, label_factor,
                          alpha = 1,
                          family = "binomial")

# LASSO mit Cross-Validation (findet bestes Lambda automatisch)
lasso_model <- cv.glmnet(clinical_matrix, label_factor, 
                          alpha = 1,          # alpha=1 ist LASSO
                          family = "binomial")

# Koeffizienten beim besten Lambda
lasso_coefs <- coef(lasso_model, s = "lambda.min")
print(lasso_coefs)

# Nur Variablen mit Koeffizient != 0 behalten
selected_clinical <- rownames(lasso_coefs)[which(lasso_coefs != 0)]
selected_clinical <- selected_clinical[selected_clinical != "(Intercept)"]
cat("Ausgewählte klinische Variablen:\n")
print(selected_clinical)
```

```{r}
# Nur die von LASSO ausgewählten klinischen Features
clinical_selected <- clinical_features[, selected_clinical, drop = FALSE]

# Datensätze neu zusammenstellen
df_clinical_lasso <- na.omit(data.frame(clinical_selected, label = as.factor(labels)))
df_combined_lasso <- na.omit(data.frame(expr_features, clinical_selected, label = as.factor(labels)))

# Modelle trainieren
model_clinical_lasso <- randomForest(label ~ ., data = df_clinical_lasso, ntree = 500)
model_combined_lasso <- randomForest(label ~ ., data = df_combined_lasso, ntree = 500)

# Vergleich
data.frame(
  Modell = c("Expression only", "Clinical (LASSO)", "Combined (LASSO)"),
  Accuracy = c(1 - model_expr$err.rate[500, "OOB"],
               1 - model_clinical_lasso$err.rate[500, "OOB"],
               1 - model_combined_lasso$err.rate[500, "OOB"])
)
```
